pattern_base_scores._comment: Base signal scores by dose-response pattern type

monotonic_down_by_domain._comment: Domain-specific weights for decreasing dose-response patterns (IMP-07)

confidence_multipliers._comment: Confidence level multipliers for signal scoring

continuous_weights._comment: Component weights for continuous endpoint signal scoring (sum = 1.0)

incidence_weights._comment: Component weights for incidence endpoint signal scoring

incidence_boosts._comment: Signal boost factors for incidence endpoints

noael_contribution_weights._comment: NOAEL contribution weights by confidence tier

noael_penalties._comment: Penalty deductions from NOAEL confidence score

clinical_severity_floors._comment: Fold-change floors and additive boosts by severity tier

backend_pattern_scores._comment: Backend default pattern scores (overridable per study via threshold_config.json)
